response.justification: Strong technical leader with proven infrastructure and distributed systems experience, but critically lacks the required 8 years of C++ expertise—resume shows only ~6 months of professional C++ work at National Instruments (2007-2008) plus a thesis project. Career trajectory is full-stack web/backend engineering rather than compute platform specialization. Missing preferred cloud/DevOps team leadership experience and advanced degree.
strengths: Proven Staff-level technical leadership with demonstrated mentoring across teams
Hands-on experience building high-performance distributed systems handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby
Strong DevOps and infrastructure foundation with Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, and GitLab administration
concerns: Critically insufficient C++ experience—only ~6 months professional work plus bachelor thesis against required 8 years
No demonstrated expertise in cloud compute platform architecture or specialized compute infrastructure domains
Career focused on full-stack web and backend development rather than infrastructure/compute specialization path
